properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v11 v14 v15

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, Our redemption Our salvation, Is in His blood Jesus, Light of Heaven Friend forever (I'm telling you it's gonna get rowdy in here), His kingdom come (like old school rowdy, like no one cares).

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, Our redemption Our salvation (I pray that God gives the elderly young bones for a minute) Is in His blood (in Jesus name) Jesus, Light of Heaven Friend forever, His kingdom come.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So we will sing, We will dance 'Til the Earth echoes the heavens Sing His praise 'Til we see the other side.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: 'Cause we belong to the light, When the night is at its darkest, Just hold on for the dawn will soon arrive.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Can you feel the winds are changing? There's a new day on the rise, And the atmosphere is breaking, As the new world comes to life.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, can you feel the winds are changing? There's a new day on the rise, And the atmosphere is breaking, As the new world comes to life.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So we will sing, We will dance, 'Til the Earth echoes the heavens, Sing His praise, 'Til we see the other side (get ready, let me see your hands).

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Oh, I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long, I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long.

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Oh, I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long, I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long (I got a feeling).

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long (one more time, we sing), I've got a feeling, The darkness won't last very long.

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Let a sleeping world awaken, There's a new day on the rise, And the enemy is shaking, As the graveyards spring to life.

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: So we will sing, We will dance, 'Til the Earth echoes the heavens, Sing His praise, 'Til we see the other side (sing it again).

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Let a sleeping world awaken (come on), There's a new day on the rise, And the enemy is shaking, As the graveyards spring to life (sing it again, let a sleeping world).

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: So we will sing, We will dance 'Til the Earth echoes the heavens Sing His praise 'Til we see the other side (this is the last time, everybody)

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Jesus, Our redemption, Our salvation, Is in His blood, Jesus, Light of Heaven, Friend forever, His kingdom come.
